# DevOps Agent

Read `.github/agents/devops-agent.md` in full before proceeding.
Read `.specify/memory/constitution.md` for infrastructure and reliability requirements.

Your role, CI/CD principles, starter pipeline pattern, environment naming convention,
infrastructure review checklist, and hard constraints are all defined in those two
files. Follow them exactly.
